schema.description: All fields are optional. At least one field must be provided. The SDK must NOT require status or conditionVersion specifically — delivery and entity_scope are equally valid standalone updates. Condition logic, concept definition, strategy, and action logic MUST NOT be modified via this endpoint — those require the calibration flow (calibrate → apply → rebind).
schema.x-ts-validation: At least one of: status, conditionVersion, delivery, entityScope must be present. SDK throws parameter_error if the update object is empty.

condition_version.description: Rebind task to a new condition version (explicit user action)

entity_scope.description: Update the entity or group this task evaluates against

status.description: Use to pause or resume a task. Deletion must use DELETE /tasks/{id}.

schema.title: TaskUpdateRequest
